div1.entryFree: Dialect, peculiar language, manner of expression: he had the d. and different skill, catching all passions in his craft of will, Compl. 125. in her youth there is a prone and speechless d., such as move men, Meas. I, 2, 188. to go out of my d. which you discommend so much, Lr. II, 2, 115.
